## Overview

Release candidate for v0.2.14. **Validates the new macOS distribution path
(universal binary + DMG)** end-to-end on the GitHub Actions runner before
the stable release ships ([#133](https://github.com/ensky0/tildaz/issues/133)).

If you are an end user, please download the stable v0.2.14 release once it
ships. This RC is for distribution-pipeline verification.

## What's new since v0.2.13

### Quit confirmation dialog ([#116](https://github.com/ensky0/tildaz/issues/116))

Cmd+Q (macOS) and Alt+F4 (Windows) now show a confirmation dialog with the
number of open tabs before exiting. Default button is Cancel so an
accidental Enter does not trigger the quit. Closing the last tab via Cmd+W
(macOS) / Ctrl+Shift+W (Windows) keeps the existing immediate-exit
behavior — that path is an explicit "close this tab" action.

### Tab bar horizontal scroll + arrow / new-tab buttons ([#117](https://github.com/ensky0/tildaz/issues/117))

When the tab bar overflows the window width, the viewport now auto-scrolls
to keep the active tab visible (Chrome minimum-move pattern). Firefox-style
controls appear at the edges:

- `<` / `>` arrows — scroll the viewport one tab width per click. Greyed
  out when there's nothing more to scroll.
- `+` button — always visible, creates a new tab.
- Drag-to-reorder auto-scrolls the viewport when the dragged tab reaches
  either edge.

Tab width stays fixed at 150pt — there is no squish.

### macOS distribution: universal binary + DMG ([#133](https://github.com/ensky0/tildaz/issues/133))

The macOS release artifact is now a single DMG (`tildaz-vX.Y.Z-macos.dmg`)
containing a universal binary that runs on both Apple Silicon and Intel
Macs (macOS 13 Ventura and later). The previous `tildaz-vX.Y.Z-macos-aarch64.zip`
is gone.

To install: open the DMG, drag `TildaZ.app` into the Applications folder
shortcut. On first launch macOS may block the ad-hoc-signed app — right-click
"Open" or run `xattr -d com.apple.quarantine /Applications/TildaZ.app` to
clear the quarantine attribute, then grant Input Monitoring + Accessibility
permissions once.

## Verification

- [x] Local Apple Silicon: `zig build package` produces a universal DMG
      that mounts and shows the expected `.app` + Applications alias
      layout. `lipo -info` confirms both `arm64` and `x86_64` slices.
- [ ] GitHub Actions `macos-15` runner: same `zig build package` flow
      with cross-compile to `x86_64-macos`. **This RC validates that path.**
- [ ] Verify the DMG downloads from the GitHub Release page, mounts, and
      runs on Apple Silicon and Intel hardware.
